welcome_offer.description: Earn up to $300 cash back after $3,000 in purchases within the first 6 months; $250 may be the non-referral public offer.
notes: Amex frequently exposes public/referral variants; require issuer/referral source confirmation before production apply.
source_conflicts: Public issuer-visible offer may be $250 while referral/elevated variants may show up to $300.

caveats: Keep production card JSON untouched; this config is adaptor-only.

open_questions: Confirm whether OpenCard should track public issuer offer only or elevated referral variants for Amex BCP.

community.summary: Track Amex Blue Cash Preferred; public/elevated variants may differ between $250 and $300.

observations.source: American Express Blue Cash Preferred page
observations.excerpt: Amex BCP welcome offer should be validated against issuer/referral source before production apply.
